# showwhat

> Feature flags and config you own. Platform-agnostic.

showwhat is a definition format, rule engine, and visual tooling for feature flags and config. Define rules in YAML or JSON, evaluate them in your app, and store definitions wherever you want.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/): Quick start, installation, and first definition
- [Definitions](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/definitions): How definitions and variations are structured
- [Conditions](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/conditions): All built-in condition types
- [Context](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/context): The runtime context object
- [Data Sources](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/data-sources): Built-in and custom data source interfaces
- [Presets](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/presets): Reusable condition templates
- [Custom Conditions](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/custom-conditions): Writing and registering custom evaluators
- [Custom Data Sources](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/custom-data-sources): Filesystem, HTTP, and database implementations
- [OpenFeature](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/openfeature): OpenFeature Server SDK provider
- [Configurator](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/configurator): Browser-based visual editor for definitions
- [Core API](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/core): Full API reference
- [Errors](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/errors): Error types and hierarchy
- [Comparison](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/comparison): How showwhat differs from hosted platforms

## Packages

- [showwhat](https://www.npmjs.com/package/showwhat): Main API for resolving feature flags and config values
- [@showwhat/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@showwhat/core): Rule engine, schemas, parsers, and in-memory data source
- [@showwhat/configurator](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@showwhat/configurator): React component library for visual rule editing
- [@showwhat/openfeature](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@showwhat/openfeature): OpenFeature bridge for showwhat definitions

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/llms-full.txt): Full codebase context for LLMs (monorepo layout, exports, conventions, key files)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/yeojz/showwhat): Source code and issues
- [Security](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/security): Security considerations for untrusted definitions
- [Sample Config](https://showwhat.yeojz.dev/docs/sample-config): Example definition file
